2026-04-20.patch_summary: This patch introduces FUSE_PASSTHROUGH_INO mode, a stricter variant of the existing FUSE_PASSTHROUGH mode. In this new mode, the kernel ensures that fuse inodes are uniquely identified by their backing file inode number, preventing multiple fuse inodes from being mapped to the same backing file unless they are hardlinks. This is only supported on 64-bit architectures where the inode number can be a u64 value. The patch modifies several files in the fs/fuse directory to implement this new mode.
